summary: Harden cloud auth routing, move critical writes behind guarded RPCs, add migration/release quality gates, split route bundles, and drive project role requirements from database configuration.

notes: Auth/RLS helper functions now reject inactive or terminated employees.
Approval template, project, project assignment, and employee update writes now use authenticated SECURITY DEFINER RPCs.
Project role requirements for PM/CC/PMCC are stored in public.project_role_requirements.
Function grant assertions now expect 47 public functions, 0 PostgreSQL PUBLIC EXECUTE grants, and 19 authenticated EXECUTE grants.
Routes are lazy-loaded with React Suspense to split page bundles.
The Supabase REST compatibility layer now shares a dedicated restClient module.
Project owner role labels, ordering, and fallback rules now come from database configuration.
Vite and @vitejs/plugin-react were upgraded; frontend check now runs lint, build, and high-severity audit.

deployment.cloud: Build frontend with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.17 and production VITE variables, sync frontend/dist, rebuild the app image with APP_IMAGE_TAG=V0.17, apply migrations, then run pre-deploy and frontend render smoke checks.
notes: deploy-aliyun.sh runs frontend lint/audit when npm is available and preserves the SKIP_FRONTEND_BUILD=1 prebuilt-dist path for servers without npm.
apply-migrations.sh fails early when duplicate three-digit migration prefixes are present.
.dockerignore excludes local secrets, env files, node_modules, backups, and test reports.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.17 and production VITE variables.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud server.
known_warnings: ESLint still reports existing warnings in dashboard/ui/TimesheetPage files, but exits 0.
Vite still warns that the main index chunk is larger than 500 kB.
